[northern_physio] B1 — Both bands: band question re-asked on open availability query
[northern_physio] B2 — Exhausted slots: agent asks for alternative day
[northern_physio] B3 — Morning selected: first-and-last slot pair offered (STEP 9)
[northern_physio] B4 — Unavailable time: nearest-pair alternative offered
[northern_physio] C2 — No-availability retry: new timeframe triggers availability tool
[northern_physio] D1 — ASAP timeframe: availability tool called find_next_available
[northern_physio] E1 — No timeframe: agent asks when
[northern_physio] E3 — Abandon availability: universal_router called
[northern_physio] E4 — Service pivot escape: universal_router change_service
[northern_physio] E7 — Location change: universal_router change_location
[northern_physio] E8 — Multiple changes: universal_router multiple_changes
[northern_physio] M1 — Multi-pract with first_available: slot offer, no preference question
[northern_physio] M2 — Multi-pract: 'next available' triggers direct CONFIRMATION
[northern_physio] M4 — Multi-pract: named practitioner stored, continues
[northern_physio] M5 — Ambiguous practitioner name: disambiguation question
[northern_physio] M6 — Single practitioner: no preference question, slot offer
[northern_physio] S7A — STEP 7 no-match day: day-list alternative offer
[northern_physio] S7C — S7 caller names specific time: agent reads slot from Tuesday afternoon
[northern_physio] S7D — S7 relative earlier signal: morning band selected, morning slots offered
[northern_physio] S7G — S7 no first_available: old day-list fallback behaviour
